title: foeniculum officinale subsp. dulce
intro: Foeniculum officinale subsp. dulce, commonly known as sweet fennel, is a perennial herb that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. Its medicinal properties include its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to relieve digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of sweet fennel include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve digestion, and reduce stress and anxiety. Sweet fennel is typically prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or oil, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and promote relaxation.
